---
type: React Component
title: Category Link.Generated
description: CategoryLink is a React component used within the layout and navigation area of the marketing web app template, rendering a link that points users toward a specific content category.
level: component
icon: fe-component.svg
owner: contentful/team-workflows

---

It fits into the site's navigation structure, appearing wherever category-based browsing is offered—such as in headers, menus, or footers—so visitors can jump directly to grouped content relevant to their interests. As a generated component tied to this template's layout-navigation grouping, it works alongside other navigation elements to support the overall wayfinding experience across the app.
